tables.name: Work Items
tables.description: Canonical Airtable live work queue for DCOIR priorities, active work, branch state, and resume-first execution. Discovery note: maintained for schema readback so a new/blind operator or assistant can discover table purpose quickly. Inspect field descriptions before writing records.

fields.name: Work Item
fields.description: Purpose: Primary title for the work item. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: Item ID
fields.description: Purpose: Stable human-readable identifier when needed. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: Repo Path or Skill
fields.description: Purpose: Relevant repo path, skill name, or component. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: Evidence / Notes
fields.description: Purpose: Supporting notes, evidence, or rationale. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: Queue Rank
fields.description: Purpose: Explicit queue ordering for active Airtable todo authority. Lower numbers are higher priority. Type: number. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Purpose: Timestamp for when the row was created or first observed during cleanup. Type: date/time. Recommended default where configured: current date/time. If no Airtable default exists, scripts may set it explicitly.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Purpose: Timestamp for when the row was last updated or refreshed. Type: date/time. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: canonical_parent_plan_id
fields.description: Purpose: Stable parent plan id for Work Items after Plan Tasks retirement. Type: single-line text. Default: none; set when a Work Item belongs to a Plan.

fields.name: Area
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'Area' on 'Work Items'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: Work Type
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'Work Type' on 'Work Items'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: Status
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'Status' on 'Work Items'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: Priority
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'Priority' on 'Work Items'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: Authority Scope
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'Authority Scope' on 'Work Items'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: GitHub Promotion Need
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'GitHub Promotion Need' on 'Work Items'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: retention_class
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'retention_class' on 'Work Items'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: display_label
fields.description: WBS09.03 helper formula. Human-readable display label combining stable Item ID and Work Item title. Does not replace or alter the primary field.

options.formula: LOWER(IF({fldTneAArfh5yJOXi}, {fldTneAArfh5yJOXi} & " | ", "") & IF({fld62VxHtbRTZhPdX}, {fld62VxHtbRTZhPdX} & " | ", "") & IF({fldbZhaIrAX2cbHrE}, {fldbZhaIrAX2cbHrE} & " | ", "") & IF({fldZ922sf04D4WbvE}, {fldZ922sf04D4WbvE} & " | ", "") & IF({fldd0urjdszMBR1LU}, {fldd0urjdszMBR1LU} & " | ", "") & IF({fldGa1GseWf6ro78L}, {fldGa1GseWf6ro78L} & " | ", "") & IF({fldvGbvwTx84mxtwO}, {fldvGbvwTx84mxtwO} & " | ", "") & IF({fld4XJowALSopxpnV}, {fld4XJowALSopxpnV} & " | ", "") & IF({fldQ5YKb9EuM8nqph}, {fldQ5YKb9EuM8nqph} & " | ", "") & IF({fldATbftmJ4UQ8Flk}, {fldATbftmJ4UQ8Flk} & " | ", ""))

fields.name: search_text
fields.description: WBS09.03 helper formula. Lowercase searchable text combining stable ID, title, parent plan, repo/skill, area/type/status/priority/authority, and GitHub promotion need. Does not replace or alter the primary field.

tables.name: Session Checkpoints
tables.description: Durable session-resume checkpoints used to carry DCOIR continuity between chats and sessions. Discovery note: maintained for schema readback so a new/blind operator or assistant can discover table purpose quickly. Inspect field descriptions before writing records.

fields.name: checkpoint_id
fields.description: Purpose: Stable checkpoint identifier. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: session_id
fields.description: Purpose: Stable session or branch identifier. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: state_summary
fields.description: Purpose: Compact summary of current session state. Type: long text. Default: use the table workflow standard where configured; otherwise scripts should set this explicitly.

fields.name: current_focus
fields.description: Purpose: What is actively being worked now. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: open_threads
fields.description: Purpose: Unfinished lines of effort. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: captured_ideas_summary
fields.description: Purpose: Summary of ideas carried in this checkpoint. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: decisions_constraints
fields.description: Purpose: Important decisions, constraints, or rules. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: buffered_promotion_candidates
fields.description: Purpose: Items that may need GitHub promotion later. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: next_recommended_move
fields.description: Purpose: Single best next move from this checkpoint. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: local_state_hash
fields.description: Purpose: Hash of the local JSON state for dedupe. Type: single-line text. Default: use the table workflow standard where configured; otherwise scripts should set this explicitly.

fields.name: resume_prompt
fields.description: Purpose: Compact resume-ready prompt or handoff cue. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Purpose: Timestamp for when the row was created or first observed during cleanup. Type: date/time. Recommended default where configured: current date/time. If no Airtable default exists, scripts may set it explicitly.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Purpose: Timestamp for when the row was last updated or refreshed. Type: date/time. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: review_after
fields.description: Purpose: Review-after date for aging and cleanup. Type: date. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: checkpoint_at
fields.description: Purpose: Parsed checkpoint timestamp used for sorting and resume chronology. Type: date/time. Default: current date/time only when source time is unavailable; scripts should set explicitly.

fields.name: trigger
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'trigger' on 'Session Checkpoints'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: github_promotion_status
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'github_promotion_status' on 'Session Checkpoints'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: checkpoint_status
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'checkpoint_status' on 'Session Checkpoints'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: retention_class
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'retention_class' on 'Session Checkpoints'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: display_label
fields.description: WBS09.03 helper formula. Human-readable display label combining checkpoint_id, checkpoint_at, and checkpoint_status. Does not replace or alter the primary field.

options.formula: LOWER(IF({fld05CE02z75xTywV}, {fld05CE02z75xTywV} & " | ", "") & IF({fld63FgvRtBDYjHw1}, {fld63FgvRtBDYjHw1} & " | ", "") & IF({fldDmyw0j3EKlt5YF}, DATETIME_FORMAT({fldDmyw0j3EKlt5YF}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm') & " | ", "") & IF({fldTaxKPaShTfMFog}, {fldTaxKPaShTfMFog} & " | ", "") & IF({flduf5QvQRtyMRfq4}, {flduf5QvQRtyMRfq4} & " | ", "") & IF({fldb34YQQ976acIzJ}, {fldb34YQQ976acIzJ} & " | ", ""))

fields.name: search_text
fields.description: WBS09.03 helper formula. Lowercase searchable text combining checkpoint id, session id, timestamp, trigger, checkpoint status, and retention class. Conservative version avoids long-text continuity fields. Does not replace or alter the primary field.

tables.name: Idea Inbox
tables.description: Durable intake table for ideas, observations, deferred improvements, and later-promotion candidates. Discovery note: maintained for schema readback so a new/blind operator or assistant can discover table purpose quickly. Inspect field descriptions before writing records.

fields.name: idea_id
fields.description: Purpose: Stable idea identifier. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: session_id
fields.description: Purpose: Source session or branch identifier. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: idea_title
fields.description: Purpose: Short title for the idea. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: idea_detail
fields.description: Purpose: Full detail or rationale for the idea. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: why_it_matters
fields.description: Purpose: Why the idea matters if preserved. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: suggested_promotion_target
fields.description: Purpose: Likely next durable destination if promoted. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Purpose: Additional notes, updates, or caveats. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: github_promotion_completed
fields.description: Purpose: Whether the idea was durably promoted to GitHub. Type: checkbox. Default/omitted behavior: unchecked unless an Airtable field default says otherwise.

fields.name: source_checkpoint_id
fields.description: Purpose: Checkpoint that first carried this idea, when known. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Purpose: Timestamp for when the row was created or first observed during cleanup. Type: date/time. Recommended default where configured: current date/time. If no Airtable default exists, scripts may set it explicitly.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Purpose: Timestamp for when the row was last updated or refreshed. Type: date/time. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: review_after
fields.description: Purpose: Review-after date for aging and cleanup. Type: date. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: captured_at
fields.description: Purpose: Parsed idea capture timestamp used for intake sorting and promotion review. Type: date/time. Default: current date/time only when source time is unavailable; scripts should set explicitly.

fields.name: related_area
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'related_area' on 'Idea Inbox'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'status' on 'Idea Inbox'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: retention_class
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'retention_class' on 'Idea Inbox'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

tables.name: Plans
tables.description: Plan-level execution state for multi-step DCOIR work, active task context, and resume guidance. Discovery note: maintained for schema readback so a new/blind operator or assistant can discover table purpose quickly. Inspect field descriptions before writing records.

fields.name: plan_id
fields.description: Purpose: Stable plan identifier. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: plan_title
fields.description: Purpose: Human-readable plan title. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: active_task_id
fields.description: Purpose: Current active task id. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: active_task_title
fields.description: Purpose: Current active task title. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: scope_constraints
fields.description: Purpose: Plan objective, assumptions, constraints, and stop conditions summary. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: exact_resume_goal
fields.description: Purpose: Operator-facing exact resume goal. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: resume_detail
fields.description: Purpose: Verbose resume detail. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: why_current_task_matters
fields.description: Purpose: Why the active task matters now. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: carry_forward_note
fields.description: Purpose: Carry-forward reminder for the next branch. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: legacy_plan_buffer_marker_review
fields.description: Purpose: Next flush/manicure trigger. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: legacy_pending_plan_buffer_items_review
fields.description: Purpose: Buffered items pending flush. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: legacy_promotion_candidates_review
fields.description: Purpose: Promotion-ready items staged from the plan. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: legacy_remain_local_notes_review
fields.description: Purpose: Items that should remain local for now. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: next_recommended_action
fields.description: Purpose: Single best next action for the plan. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: legacy_last_updated_text_review
fields.description: Purpose: ISO timestamp or text marker for last update. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: Queue Control
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'Queue Control' used by the 'Plans' table. Type: linked-record list. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: legacy_active_plan_task_id_review
fields.description: Purpose: Unique active plan task key. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR aging field. Existing rows may be backfilled with the date/time the cleanup pass first saw them. Type: date/time. Recommended default where configured: current date/time. If no Airtable default exists, scripts may set it explicitly.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR aging field. Existing rows may be backfilled with the date/time the cleanup pass first saw them. Type: date/time. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: review_after
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR manual cleanup review date. Rows on or before this date are candidates for human review. Type: date. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: plan_state
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'plan_state' on 'Plans'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: retention_class
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'retention_class' on 'Plans'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

tables.name: Operator Preferences
tables.description: Durable operator preferences that guide response style, package behavior, and DCOIR workflow defaults. Discovery note: maintained for schema readback so a new/blind operator or assistant can discover table purpose quickly. Inspect field descriptions before writing records.

fields.name: preference_key
fields.description: Purpose: Stable preference identifier. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: preference_statement
fields.description: Purpose: Plain-language statement of the preference. Type: long text. Default: use the table workflow standard where configured; otherwise scripts should set this explicitly.

fields.name: effective_behavior
fields.description: Purpose: How the assistant should behave when applying the preference. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: source_session_id
fields.description: Purpose: Source session or branch identifier when known. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: source_checkpoint_id
fields.description: Purpose: Checkpoint that established or carried the preference when known. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: source_idea_id
fields.description: Purpose: Idea Inbox source identifier when the preference came from an idea-capture item. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: last_confirmed_text
fields.description: Purpose: ISO timestamp or text for the latest confirmation or carry-forward use. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Purpose: Supporting context, caveats, or implementation notes. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Purpose: Timestamp for when the row was created or first observed during cleanup. Type: date/time. Recommended default where configured: current date/time. If no Airtable default exists, scripts may set it explicitly.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Purpose: Timestamp for when the row was last updated or refreshed. Type: date/time. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: review_after
fields.description: Purpose: Review-after date for aging and cleanup. Type: date. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: curation_reason
fields.description: Reason for the curation decision.

fields.name: curated_at
fields.description: UTC timestamp when the preference row was curated.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'status' on 'Operator Preferences'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'scope' on 'Operator Preferences'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: retention_class
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'retention_class' on 'Operator Preferences'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: curation_decision
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'curation_decision' on 'Operator Preferences'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

tables.name: Validation Test Cases

Discovery note: maintained for schema readback so a new/blind operator or assistant can discover table purpose quickly. Inspect field descriptions before writing records.

fields.name: Test Case
fields.description: Purpose: Primary operator-facing test title. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: Test ID
fields.description: Purpose: Stable human-readable test identifier. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: Feature or Behavior

fields.name: Command or Method

fields.name: Pass Criteria

fields.name: Fail Criteria

fields.name: Evidence / Notes

fields.name: Source Basis

fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'Area' on 'Validation Test Cases'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

tables.name: Queue Control
tables.description: Canonical control surface for the active DCOIR queue branch, resume rules, and supersession decisions. Discovery note: maintained for schema readback so a new/blind operator or assistant can discover table purpose quickly. Inspect field descriptions before writing records.

fields.name: control_key
fields.description: Purpose: Stable queue-control record identifier. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: active_plans

fields.name: branch_summary
fields.description: Purpose: Plain-language summary of the active queue branch. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: branch_decision
fields.description: Purpose: Why this branch is active and what it supersedes. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: superseded_github_surfaces

fields.name: resume_rule

fields.name: next_revalidation_trigger

fields.name: last_confirmed_text
fields.description: Purpose: Latest confirmation timestamp or marker. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Purpose: Additional implementation notes or migration caveats. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Purpose: Timestamp for when the row was created or first observed during cleanup. Type: date/time. Recommended default where configured: current date/time. If no Airtable default exists, scripts may set it explicitly.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Purpose: Timestamp for when the row was last updated or refreshed. Type: date/time. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: review_after
fields.description: Purpose: Review-after date for aging and cleanup. Type: date. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'status' on 'Queue Control'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'retention_class' on 'Queue Control'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: display_label
fields.description: WBS09.03 helper formula. Human-readable display label combining control_key, status, and branch summary preview. Does not replace or alter the primary field.

options.formula: LOWER(IF({fldFcVnCHlzrZYDw1}, {fldFcVnCHlzrZYDw1} & " | ", "") & IF({fld93kyr3N268jC2L}, {fld93kyr3N268jC2L} & " | ", "") & IF({fld426HqFdGNRfe9w}, {fld426HqFdGNRfe9w} & " | ", "") & IF({fldwfYuyQqR9ipkip}, {fldwfYuyQqR9ipkip} & " | ", "") & IF({fldivEi9YIHzqXRs3}, {fldivEi9YIHzqXRs3} & " | ", "") & IF({fldcIeUiSJQrLLLIU}, {fldcIeUiSJQrLLLIU} & " | ", "") & IF({fld8xcTo7kh5YGSxV}, {fld8xcTo7kh5YGSxV} & " | ", ""))

fields.description: WBS09.03 helper formula. Lowercase searchable text combining control key, branch summary/decision, resume rule, revalidation trigger, status, and retention class. Does not replace or alter the primary field.

tables.name: Gemini Research Reference
tables.description: Reference layer for Gemini Enterprise and Vertex AI research findings that affect DCOIR Gemini design and validation. Discovery note: maintained for schema readback so a new/blind operator or assistant can discover table purpose quickly. Inspect field descriptions before writing records.

fields.name: finding_key
fields.description: Purpose: Stable research finding identifier. Type: single-line text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: legacy_research_batch_review
fields.description: Legacy text source for research batch values. Superseded by research_batch_select (fld76GQAQ03B1sQW8) after WBS02 parity validation evidence VE-DBREDESIGN-WBS02-RESEARCH-BATCH-SELECT-REPLACEMENT-20260509. Retained temporarily for staged retirement and dependency observation. Do not use for new filters, views, scripts, records, or workflows. Do not delete without separate explicit approval and fresh dependency readback.

fields.name: consult_when
fields.description: Purpose: When future Gemini work should explicitly consult this finding. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: design_impact
fields.description: Purpose: Why this matters for DCOIR Gemini design, repair, or validation work. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: source_basis
fields.description: Purpose: Source page, page span, and grounding summary for the finding. Type: long text. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: active
fields.description: Purpose: Whether this finding remains active for current Gemini work. Type: checkbox. Default/omitted behavior: unchecked unless an Airtable field default says otherwise.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Purpose: Timestamp for when the row was created or first observed during cleanup. Type: date/time. Recommended default where configured: current date/time. If no Airtable default exists, scripts may set it explicitly.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Purpose: Timestamp for when the row was last updated or refreshed. Type: date/time. Default: none documented here; set explicitly when required.

fields.name: review_after

tables.name: DCOIR Lifecycle Ledger
tables.description: Canonical lifecycle-history ledger for DCOIR Airtable objects that move through intake, planning, work execution, checkpointing, queue state, and migration/cleanup events. This table is a readback/history surface, not the live task authority. Use Work Items for executable work, Plans for parent scope, Session Checkpoints for resume continuity, and Delete Queue for deletion workflow. Inspect field descriptions before writing records. New scripts should set event_key, source_table, source_record_id, lifecycle_object_type, lifecycle_stage, event_at, migration_status, created_at, and retention_class explicitly.

fields.name: event_key
fields.description: Purpose: Stable unique lifecycle event key used for deduplication and readback verification. Type: single-line text. Default: none; scripts must set explicitly.

fields.name: source_table
fields.description: Purpose: Source Airtable table name for the lifecycle event. Type: single-line text. Default: none; scripts must set explicitly. Keep text because source tables may evolve.

fields.name: source_record_id
fields.description: Purpose: Source Airtable record id for the lifecycle event when known. Type: single-line text. Default: none; scripts should set when source is record-backed.

fields.name: source_primary_key
fields.description: Purpose: Human-readable primary key from the source record when available. Type: single-line text. Default: none; scripts may set for operator readability.

fields.name: event_at
fields.description: Purpose: Date/time when the lifecycle event happened or was observed. Type: date/time. Default: current date/time only if the script cannot recover a source timestamp.

fields.name: event_title
fields.description: Purpose: Short operator-readable event title. Type: single-line text. Default: none; scripts should set a concise title.

fields.name: event_summary
fields.description: Purpose: Detailed event summary and rationale. Type: long text. Default: none; scripts should summarize source context without relying on chat memory.

fields.name: payload_json
fields.description: Purpose: JSON snapshot of source context for audit/readback. Type: long text. Default: none; scripts should store compact JSON with secrets excluded.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Purpose: Date/time when this ledger row was created. Type: date/time. Recommended native default where supported: current date/time; scripts should backfill if blank.

fields.name: lifecycle_object_type
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'lifecycle_object_type' on 'DCOIR Lifecycle Ledger'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: lifecycle_stage
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'lifecycle_stage' on 'DCOIR Lifecycle Ledger'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: migration_status
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'migration_status' on 'DCOIR Lifecycle Ledger'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

fields.name: retention_class
fields.description: Purpose: DCOIR field 'retention_class' on 'DCOIR Lifecycle Ledger'. Type: singleSelect. Default: see Admin Registry/manual checklist for native default policy. Values/options should be lowercase canonical forms where applicable.

tables.name: Local Configuration Registry
tables.description: Registry of local configuration names used by DCOIR code-generation and operator-run scripts. Values are not stored here; records identify names, purpose, usage class, and safe reference guidance.

fields.name: config_name
fields.description: Purpose: Exact local configuration name. Type: single-line text. Default: none; set explicitly.

fields.name: purpose
fields.description: Purpose: Explanation of how the configuration name is used. Type: long text. Default: none; set explicitly.

fields.name: reference_powershell
fields.description: Purpose: Runtime-specific environment-variable reference pattern for Windows PowerShell and PowerShell 7. Type: single-line text. Table default: none; no native default configured. Set explicitly when useful. Guidance only; does not restrict the execution technology.

fields.name: sensitive_value
fields.description: Purpose: Whether the configured value needs protected handling. Type: checkbox. Default: set explicitly.

fields.name: safe_to_display
fields.description: Purpose: Whether the configured value may be displayed in logs or chat. Type: checkbox. Default: set explicitly.

fields.name: confirmed_present
fields.description: Purpose: Whether the operator confirmed the configuration name exists locally. Type: checkbox. Default: set explicitly.

fields.name: config_kind
fields.description: Purpose: Category of the configured value. Type: single select. Default: none; set explicitly.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Purpose: Lifecycle status for this registry row. Type: single select. Default: active for current rows.

fields.name: last_confirmed_at
fields.description: Purpose: Date/time when this name was last confirmed. Type: date/time. Default: set explicitly.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Purpose: Supporting notes. Type: long text. Default: none.

fields.name: reference_cmd
fields.description: Purpose: Runtime-specific environment-variable reference pattern for Windows Command Prompt batch scripts. Type: single-line text. Table default: none; no native default configured. Set explicitly when useful. Guidance only; does not restrict the execution technology.

fields.name: reference_wsl_bash
fields.description: Purpose: Runtime-specific environment-variable reference pattern for WSL, Linux shell, bash, and container shell contexts after the value is exported or bridged. Type: single-line text. Table default: none; no native default configured. Set explicitly when useful. Guidance only; does not restrict the execution technology.

fields.name: reference_python
fields.description: Purpose: Runtime-specific environment-variable reference pattern for Python scripts. Type: single-line text. Table default: none; no native default configured. Set explicitly when useful. Guidance only; does not restrict the execution technology.

fields.name: reference_additional_runtimes_json
fields.description: Purpose: Flexible JSON-style runtime-specific reference examples for additional languages and technologies such as Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust, Go, .NET/C#, Java, Ruby, PHP, R, VBA, Docker, and WSL bridging. Type: long text. Table default: none; no native default configured. Set explicitly when useful. Guidance only; does not restrict the execution technology.

tables.name: Operator Tools Registry
tables.description: Live registry of reusable operator-side helper tools for DCOIR workflows. GitHub repo remains source of truth for tool code; this table stores discoverability, trigger conditions, launcher guidance, safety preconditions, validation state, and notes so skills and future sessions can select tools dynamically without skill repackaging. Discovery note: maintained for schema readback so a new/blind operator or assistant can discover table purpose quickly. Inspect field descriptions before writing records. Scripts should set tool_id, tool_name, tool_family, repo_path, status, active, created_at, retention_class, and updated_at explicitly when creating or refreshing rows.

fields.name: tool_id
fields.description: Purpose: Stable unique identifier for the reusable operator tool. Type: single-line text. Default: none; set explicitly.

fields.name: tool_name
fields.description: Purpose: Human-readable tool name. Type: single-line text. Default: none; set explicitly.

fields.name: tool_family
fields.description: Functional family for routing and filtering.

fields.name: repo_path
fields.description: Repo-relative path to the script or tool source. GitHub is source of truth for code.

fields.name: trigger_conditions
fields.description: Natural-language conditions or keywords that should cause the advisor skill to suggest this tool.

fields.name: input_contract
fields.description: Expected operator input, parameters, manifest format, or preconditions required to run the tool.

fields.name: output_contract
fields.description: Expected output files, terminal output, logs, or artifacts produced by the tool.

fields.name: safety_preconditions
fields.description: Safety checks and stop conditions before use, such as clean tree, no stash pop, no destructive actions, or branch requirements.

fields.name: launcher_command
fields.description: Preferred PowerShell launcher command or command template.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Purpose: Lifecycle status of the tool registry row. Type: single select. Known native Airtable default: active, configured by operator. Values/options should remain lowercase canonical forms; set explicitly for draft, deprecated, or blocked rows.

fields.name: version_or_hash
fields.description: Version marker, checksum, commit hash, or tool revision hint.

fields.name: last_validated_at
fields.description: Date/time when the tool was last validated.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Supporting notes, caveats, examples, or maintenance guidance.

fields.name: active
fields.description: Purpose: Whether this tool should be considered available for current advisor routing. Type: checkbox. Known native Airtable default: checked, configured by operator for new active-tool rows. Set false explicitly for draft, blocked, deprecated, archived, or unavailable tools.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Purpose: Timestamp for when the tool registry row was created or first observed. Type: date/time. Known native Airtable default: current date/time in UTC, configured by operator. Scripts may still set explicitly when deterministic backfill or imported historical rows need a non-current value.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Purpose: Timestamp for when the tool registry row was last refreshed or materially updated. Type: date/time. Default: none; scripts should set explicitly.

fields.name: review_after
fields.description: Purpose: Review-after date for registry aging and cleanup. Type: date. Default: none; set explicitly when a review cycle applies.

fields.name: retention_class
fields.description: Purpose: Retention class for registry row lifecycle and cleanup handling. Type: single select. Known native Airtable default: operational, configured by operator. Values/options should remain lowercase canonical forms; set explicitly only when creating reference, temporary, or archive rows.

fields.name: display_label
fields.description: WBS09.03 helper formula. Human-readable display label combining tool_name and stable tool_id. Does not replace or alter the primary field.

options.formula: LOWER(IF({fld4eAc1IEWYtOJpO}, {fld4eAc1IEWYtOJpO} & " | ", "") & IF({fldcf2EIjZGqaLTcb}, {fldcf2EIjZGqaLTcb} & " | ", "") & IF({fldXiTxXPVOHnc3N3}, {fldXiTxXPVOHnc3N3} & " | ", "") & IF({fldjkzxBAty8ueGuI}, {fldjkzxBAty8ueGuI} & " | ", "") & IF({fldRyccDc3UOBrKKR}, {fldRyccDc3UOBrKKR} & " | ", "") & IF({fldTq4aJ6AoIFqJUo}, {fldTq4aJ6AoIFqJUo} & " | ", "") & IF({fldjo5ToZNd2xbPz2}, {fldjo5ToZNd2xbPz2} & " | ", "") & IF({fldrAntwrkqI3gzWF}, {fldrAntwrkqI3gzWF} & " | ", "") & IF({fldxx6kWXejTnqv9t}, {fldxx6kWXejTnqv9t} & " | ", "") & IF({fld9l7TFNXFZcWY97}, "active true | ", "active false | "))

fields.name: search_text
fields.description: WBS09.03 helper formula. Lowercase searchable text combining tool id/name/family, repo path, trigger/input/output context, status, version/hash, and active flag. Does not replace or alter the primary field.

tables.name: DCOIR Cleanup WBS
tables.description: Plan-scoped WBS table for the DCOIR Airtable Cleanup and Restructuring Plan. Stores ordered hierarchy, target surface, completion criteria, validation notes, and future-session context.

fields.name: wbs_key
fields.description: Stable unique WBS key such as CLEANUP-WBS-04-02-01.

fields.name: plan_key
fields.description: Parent plan key.

fields.name: wbs_path
fields.description: Ordered work-breakdown path such as 04, 04.02, or 04.02.01.

fields.name: parent_wbs_key
fields.description: Parent WBS key for nested tasks.

fields.name: rank
fields.description: Numeric order within the parent scope.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Human-readable work item title.

fields.name: level
fields.description: Hierarchy level.

fields.name: surface
fields.description: Primary project surface.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Current state.

fields.name: gate
fields.description: Approval or review gate for this item.

fields.name: target
fields.description: Specific table, field, skill, file, workflow, source, tool, or object.

fields.name: done_criteria
fields.description: Exact conditions required before this item can be marked complete.

fields.name: validation_notes
fields.description: Readback, evidence, dependency, or searchability proof required.

fields.name: context
fields.description: Self-contained context for future sessions.

fields.name: review_after
fields.description: Review date for open or unresolved items.

fields.name: display_label
fields.description: WBS09.03 pilot helper formula. Human-readable display label combining WBS path, title, and stable wbs_key. Does not replace or alter the primary field.

options.formula: LOWER(IF({fldxysOTwPhA0fk9b}, {fldxysOTwPhA0fk9b} & " | ", "") & IF({fldKoseZ9P1hPUzgh}, {fldKoseZ9P1hPUzgh} & " | ", "") & IF({fldUcO6yamUW9Yr0R}, {fldUcO6yamUW9Yr0R} & " | ", "") & IF({fldxbbxdH7Mdishkr}, {fldxbbxdH7Mdishkr} & " | ", "") & IF({fldjutcnESO7o1XQv}, {fldjutcnESO7o1XQv} & " | ", "") & IF({fldf9wxS1NQ4zETgi}, {fldf9wxS1NQ4zETgi} & " | ", "") & IF({fldLu2C5uWd7yYEb4}, {fldLu2C5uWd7yYEb4} & " | ", "") & IF({fld627GL9W2hnoDa5}, {fld627GL9W2hnoDa5} & " | ", "") & IF({fldW9aLKqVnENDY4Q}, {fldW9aLKqVnENDY4Q} & " | ", "") & IF({fldXVwq1qFrDeK4eO}, {fldXVwq1qFrDeK4eO} & " | ", "") & IF({fld3IwH6VYmFqnywU}, {fld3IwH6VYmFqnywU} & " | ", ""))

fields.name: search_text
fields.description: WBS09.03 pilot helper formula. Lowercase searchable text combining stable keys, path, title, state/gate/target/context. Does not replace or alter the primary field.

tables.name: DCOIR Cleanup Scaffold Registry
tables.description: Registry of plan-scoped scaffold objects created to support the DCOIR Airtable Cleanup and Restructuring Plan. Tracks purpose, source surface, lifecycle state, and final disposition review so temporary support objects do not become untracked project bloat.

fields.name: scaffold_key
fields.description: Stable key for the scaffold object.

fields.name: plan_key
fields.description: Plan this scaffold object supports.

fields.name: scaffold_name
fields.description: Human-readable scaffold object name.

fields.name: scaffold_type
fields.description: Kind of scaffold object.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Lifecycle state for this scaffold object.

fields.name: purpose
fields.description: Why this scaffold object exists and how it supports the plan.

fields.name: created_surface
fields.description: Where the scaffold object exists, such as Airtable, GitHub, skill, workflow, or project configuration.

fields.name: created_locator
fields.description: Pointer to the created object, table, file, workflow, or skill.

fields.name: final_disposition
fields.description: Required plan-conclusion decision.

fields.name: review_after
fields.description: Review date for this scaffold object.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Context, constraints, and disposition notes.

tables.name: GitHub Workflow Inventory
tables.description: Routing registry for DCOIR GitHub Actions workflows. This table owns general workflow task-routing guidance, cache-routing hints, and workflow inventory readback. Workflow-specific execution guidance belongs in the corresponding .github/workflows/*.yml header, and executable truth remains the workflow YAML body. Discovery note: maintained for schema readback so a new/blind operator or assistant can discover table purpose quickly. Inspect field descriptions before writing records.

fields.name: workflow_key
fields.description: Stable workflow registry identifier.

fields.name: workflow_file_stem
fields.description: Repo workflow filename without extension, normalized for display and generated-key formulas.

fields.name: workflow_name
fields.description: GitHub Actions workflow display name from YAML name or filename fallback.

fields.name: repo_path
fields.description: Repo-relative path to the workflow YAML file.

fields.name: workflow_family
fields.description: Controlled workflow family used for routing and filtering.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Lifecycle or routing status for this workflow row.

fields.name: trigger_family
fields.description: Compact trigger category for routing and filtering.

fields.name: routing_owner_skill
fields.description: Primary helper skill expected to consult this row for routing decisions.

fields.name: active
fields.description: Whether this workflow should be considered active for current routing.

fields.name: use_when
fields.description: General task-routing guidance for when a session should use this workflow.

fields.name: avoid_when
fields.description: General anti-routing guidance and cases where another lane is safer.

fields.name: dispatch_inputs_summary
fields.description: Human-readable summary of workflow_dispatch inputs or request-file contract.

fields.name: trigger_summary
fields.description: Human-readable summary of workflow triggers. Executable truth remains the YAML body.

fields.name: runtime_dependencies
fields.description: Scripts, manifests, repo files, or request contracts this workflow calls or validates.

fields.name: readback_summary
fields.description: Where to inspect reports, artifacts, generated files, commits, or outcome evidence.

fields.name: safety_notes
fields.description: Safety posture, stop conditions, path restrictions, cleanup behavior, and cautions.

fields.name: maintenance_notes
fields.description: How to keep this row aligned with workflow headers and YAML behavior.

fields.name: cache_scope
fields.description: Cache inclusion category for helper-skill workflow routing.

fields.name: retention_class
fields.description: Retention class for registry lifecycle and cleanup handling.

fields.name: source_snapshot
fields.description: Snapshot or source package identifier used to seed or refresh the row.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Timestamp when this workflow inventory row was created or first observed.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Timestamp when this workflow inventory row was last refreshed or materially updated.

fields.name: review_after
fields.description: Review-after date for aging, routing drift, or cleanup review.

fields.name: workflow_seq_auto
fields.description: Purpose: Airtable-native autonumber used as a collision-resistant sequence source for future generated workflow keys. Type: autonumber. Default: Airtable assigns automatically for each new record; do not edit manually.

fields.name: workflow_key_native
fields.description: Purpose: Airtable-native generated workflow key used to compare generated key output against the stable primary workflow_key. Type: formula. Default: computed from workflow_family, workflow_file_stem, and workflow_seq_auto; do not edit manually.

fields.name: display_label
fields.description: WBS09.03 helper formula. Human-readable display label combining workflow_name and stable workflow_key. Does not replace or alter the primary field.

options.formula: LOWER(IF({fldZz29bykYFsFzbl}, {fldZz29bykYFsFzbl} & " | ", "") & IF({fldMKLP7OraKLpuC4}, {fldMKLP7OraKLpuC4} & " | ", "") & IF({fldtAGFwU8MfEzfNI}, {fldtAGFwU8MfEzfNI} & " | ", "") & IF({fldIgvJQIXXc2f22j}, {fldIgvJQIXXc2f22j} & " | ", "") & IF({fldA6O7FlW9tUEFW5}, {fldA6O7FlW9tUEFW5} & " | ", "") & IF({flddMiMhIe5Eg4FqZ}, {flddMiMhIe5Eg4FqZ} & " | ", "") & IF({fld2RN9svVJSSOLsv}, {fld2RN9svVJSSOLsv} & " | ", "") & IF({fldr293ymxflSjihZ}, {fldr293ymxflSjihZ} & " | ", "") & IF({flder86QaKiBMy0Yg}, {flder86QaKiBMy0Yg} & " | ", "") & IF({fldo3dDxCj99CX9cT}, {fldo3dDxCj99CX9cT} & " | ", "") & IF({fldeUhR746eIPzqHM}, "active true | ", "active false | "))

fields.name: search_text
fields.description: WBS09.03 helper formula. Lowercase searchable text combining workflow key/native key, file stem, name, repo path, family, trigger, owner skill, status, cache scope, and active flag. Does not replace or alter the primary field.
